params.name: Movement Area Rectangle
params.desc: Setup the size and default position of the movement rectangle

params.name: Player Configuration
params.default: {"Base Graphic":"","Base Acceleration":"5","Base Burst Acceleration":"0","Base Max Move Speed":"6","Extra Setup":"[]"}

params.name: Understrike Filters
params.desc: Applies filters to the controller during game

params.name: Understrike Auras
params.desc: Setup area effects to damage projectiles

params.name: Skill Configurations
params.desc: Setup skills to trigger the game

params.name: Item Configurations
params.desc: Setup items to trigger the game

params.name: Map Life Variable
params.desc: Variable used to determine player hit points else set to 1.

params.name: Map Switch
params.desc: Switch disabled at start and enabled if life point hits 0.

params.name: Color
params.desc: The color for the blackout area

params.name: Radius
params.desc: The size of the hole for player move area

params.name: Graphic
params.desc: Set the graphic for the aura

params.name: Damage Rate
params.desc: How often to perform damage application

params.name: Duration
params.desc: Length of time for aura effect.

params.name: Radius
params.desc: Apply a fixed size for the radius.

params.name: Increasing Radius
params.desc: Applies radius reduction per hit (scalar value)

params.name: Reducing Radius
params.desc: Applies radius reduction per hit (scalar value)

params.name: Contact Limit
params.desc: Max number of contact before aura fades

params.name: Contact Scale
params.desc: Additively applies value to contact object

params.name: Max Frames
params.desc: Number of frames the graphic uses

params.name: Frame Rate
params.desc: Number of update cycles needed to change frame

params.name: Graphics
params.desc: Set the graphic to use with settings

params.name: Alpha
params.desc: Alpha value of the overlay graphic

params.name: Blend Mode
params.desc: Sets the blend mode for the graphics

params.name: Identifier
params.desc: Text used to identify settings. Do not duplicate.

params.name: Reference Enemy
params.desc: Enemy to use from database for attacker reference.

params.name: Skill
params.desc: The skill data used for the understrike system. Must be configured.

params.name: Item
params.desc: The item data used for the understrike system if no skill set. Must be configured.

params.name: Backgrounds
params.desc: Setup background to display whilst game running

params.name: Frame Count
params.desc: Apply this rect at this game time. Overrides current animation

params.name: Sync Player Position
params.desc: If moving, shift player position too.

params.name: Core Color
params.desc: Color of the player active area

params.name: Force X
params.desc: Set player position on horizontal axis

params.name: Force Y
params.desc: Set player position on vertical axis

params.name: Base Graphic
params.desc: The default graphic used for the player graphic

params.name: Base Acceleration
params.desc: The highest move speed for the player

params.name: Base Max Move Speed
params.desc: The highest move speed for the player

params.name: Snap Direction Change
params.desc: If going right, immediately go left, no speed reduce.

params.name: Mode Name
params.desc: Game mode the setting is used for. 'base' is default

params.name: Force X
params.desc: Set player position on horizontal axis

params.name: Force Y
params.desc: Set player position on vertical axis

params.name: Max Move Speed
params.desc: The highest move speed for the player

params.name: Snap Direction Change
params.desc: If going right, immediately go left, no speed reduce.

params.name: Wall Teleport
params.desc: Transfer player to other side on contact with boundary.

params.name: Gravity Stomp
params.desc: Falling on enemies will destroy them

params.name: Shoot Projectile
params.desc: Setup shoot projectile for this mode

params.name: Player Movement Type
params.desc: The type of movement the plyer can perform

params.name: Initial Direction
params.desc: If directional movement, set initial direction.

params.name: Directional Moves
params.desc: If directional movement, set valid move direction.

params.name: Directional Snap
params.desc: Allow snap settings to be inherited

params.name: Snap Type
params.desc: The type of snap movement for the player

params.name: Snap Distance
params.desc: The distance (in pixels) per snap movement

params.name: Use Shield
params.desc: Apply a shield on the player

params.name: All Shield
params.desc: Apply a shield on the player in all directions

params.name: Move Range
params.desc: Set move range from player origin in pixels

params.name: Return Speed
params.desc: Player move speed under this setting. No build up.

params.name: Circle Coordinates
params.desc: Draw coordinates as circle instead of square

params.name: Move Range
params.desc: Set move range from player origin in pixels (Free)

params.name: Absolute Range
params.desc: Player cannot exceed this distance from origin

params.name: Radius
params.desc: The radius of the circle perimeter player can move

params.name: Rail Speed
params.desc: Speed of the player on the circle rail

params.name: Animate
params.desc: Constant update time value by set value

params.name: Animate
params.desc: Constantly increase time by set value

params.name: Animate
params.desc: Constantly increase time by set value

params.name: Identifier
params.desc: How to identify screen filter setting

params.name: Filter
params.desc: Select the pixi filter to use

params.name: Duration Games
params.desc: Number of understrike games the state will last.

params.name: Type
params.desc: Override existing state of this type ID

params.name: Player Overlay Graphic
params.desc: Change player overlay. Leave blank to ignore.

params.name: Player Graphic Modifier
params.desc: Change player graphic. Leave blank to ignore.

params.name: Gravity Stomp
params.desc: Falling on enemies will destroy them

params.name: Frames
params.desc: The number of frames to slice the image.

params.name: Mode Configuration
params.desc: The various game configurations to use

params.name: Mode Configuration
params.desc: The various game configurations to use

params.name: Movement Area Rectangles
params.desc: Setup the size and default position of the movement rectangle

params.name: Duration
params.desc: How long the strike system lasts in frames

params.name: Projectile Configuration
params.desc: Setup projectiles to be used in system

params.name: Obstacle Configuration
params.desc: Setup obstacles to be used in system

params.name: Enemy Configuration
params.desc: Setup projectile shooting enemies (Not real enemies)

params.name: Frame Count
params.desc: Frame in which these modifications are applied

params.name: Modify Player Data
params.desc: Modify player data at time of frame (Mode Name Not Used)

params.name: Add Understrike States
params.desc: Type unique name of understrike state to add

params.name: Remove Understrike States
params.desc: Type unique name of understrike state to remove

params.name: Spawn X
params.desc: Screen position to spawn projectile at

params.name: Spawn Y
params.desc: Screen position to spawn projectile at

params.name: Spawn Angle
params.desc: The spawn angle in radians: Math.PI * 1.5 = up

params.name: Projectile Skill
params.desc: The skill data used for projectile skill. Zero (0) for default.

params.name: Poly Graphic
params.desc: The graphic used for polygon graphic

params.name: Collider Type
params.desc: The type of collider to use for the projectile

params.name: Contact Type
params.desc: The type of contact to use for the projectile

params.name: Contact Bullet
params.desc: Allows projectile to contact with other bullets

params.name: Contact Explode
params.desc: Allows projectile to contact with other bullets

params.name: Invincibility
params.desc: The value of i-frames to grant on contact

params.name: Attract Power
params.desc: Applies constant attraction away on player/enemy.

params.name: Attract Minimal Range
params.desc: Range in pixels from which attraction effect takes place

params.name: Attract Maximum Range
params.desc: Range in pixels from which attraction effect takes place

params.name: Homing Divisor
params.desc: Divide distance to target angle by  this value

params.name: Homing Duration
params.desc: How long homing effect lasts after spawn

params.name: HP
params.desc: Life of the enemy. Each Player projectile hit is -1 HP

params.name: Angle
params.desc: Angle in PI RADIANS. Facing direction. (To right at 0)

params.name: Move Route
params.desc: Configure move route for the under enemy

params.name: Wait
params.desc: Wait for duration end to start next movement

params.name: Duration
params.desc: How long in frames to do movement

params.name: Speed
params.desc: How long in frames to do movement

params.name: Angular
params.desc: Angular radius to apply to movement
